title: Ore Canes
description: Mod adds 15 variants of vanilla sugar cane. Farm (almost) everything from coal to amethyst anywhere, anytime.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e4592cee17ec028c1c8e8d456694a50ec1fe22a.png)

Ore Canes offers a way to farm all your favorite Minecraft materials.
**Farm (almost) everything** from coal to amethyst anywhere, anytime.

Features:

- 15 Unique Cane Types: Coal, Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Lapis Lazuli, Redstone, Netherite, Obsidian, Glowstone, Eye of Ender, Quatz, Clay, Blaze Rod and Amethyst.

- Ore Fertilizer: Plant your Cane on this block to make it grow faster.

- No Light/Water Requirements: Canes grow in complete darkness and doesn't needs water.


- Harvesting: Cut the upper part to obtain resources and leave the base to grow again.


**Install:** Place the mod JAR file in your mods/ directory. It functions on the client and server. 

**Why Use Ore Canes?** Ore Canes offers a new way of getting resources. It is perfect for skyblock maps, technical modpacks, and survival worlds that require renewable resource options.

**Old mod from 2014 "Ore Garden" made me inspire and make this mod.**


**JEI(Just Enough Items) Recommended for craft recipes.**

**All texture credits to Mojang and Microsoft!**
